lines.speaker: Svidi
lines.text: None of your business! Leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It just seemed as if you were walking in circles.

lines.speaker: Svidi
lines.text: No I'm not! Now leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you still wandering around here?

lines.speaker: Svidi
lines.text: I'm now the official liaison between Rellekka and our camp. It involves a fair bit of walking around, you know.
